nasb.text: Those who camp next to him shall be the tribe of Asher, and the leader of the sons of Asher: Pagiel the son of Ochran,

esv.text: And those to camp next to him shall be the tribe of Asher, the chief of the people of Asher being Pagiel the son of Ochran,

cnv.text: 在他旁邊安營的，是亞設支派；亞設人的領袖是俄蘭的兒子帕結。

ccb.text: 在但支派旁边安营的是亚设支派，首领是俄兰的儿子帕结，
